news.t: This Bond Fund Yields 10%. Buy It if You Have the Nerve.
Junk bonds are beating the broader market so far in 2024 — but watch this shift

overview.description: The BondBloxx CCC-Rated USD High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (XCCC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index that specifically invests in USD-denominated corporate bonds with a credit rating of CCC (or its equivalent), based on an average of three main credit rating providers. XCCC was launched on May 24, 2022 and is issued by BondBloxx.
infoTable: ICE CCC US Cash Pay High Yield Constrained Index

data.title: ETF Edge: Managing long-term risk amid a new Fed chair nominee, jobs data and market volatility
data.text: From a new Fed chair nominee to a hard turn to risk-off trading in some parts of the market - the broader landscape is rapidly changing for ETF investors. BondBloxx ETFs co-founder Joanna Gallegos and...

data.title: This Bond Fund Yields 10%. Buy It if You Have the Nerve.
data.text: A Fed cut and a drop in the 10-year means you need to buy riskier junk bonds if you want higher yields. This ETF just might fill the order.

data.title: Junk bonds are beating the broader market so far in 2024 — but watch this shift
data.text: Junk bonds are beating the broader U.S. fixed-income market so far in 2024 — but pummeled Treasurys have attempted a comeback lately.

data.title: Don't buy bonds, buy ETFs: Bondbloxx's Joanna Gallegos
data.text: Joanna Gallegos, BondBloxx Investment Management co-founder, and Sarat Sethi, DCLA managing partner, join 'Power Lunch' to discuss buying corporate debt.
